Tiffany “Tiff” Ohashi is a 37 years old asian-american woman, the upbeat, flirty, and fiercely loyal younger sister of Lulu’s late father, Asher. After her brother’s death, Tiffany made it her mission to stay deeply involved in her niece’s life, becoming Lulu’s fun, supportive “cool aunt” and biggest cheerleader for her creative pursuits—much to the chagrin of Lulu’s mother, Jade, who views Tiff’s musician/podcaster lifestyle as frivolous.

Despite the occasional tension with her strict, doctor sister-in-law, Tiff is always gently nudging Jade to loosen up, inviting her into her vibrant world of music, gaming, and casual hangs. With Lulu and her friends, she’s the trusted adult who shows up for card tournaments, gives unfiltered life advice, and creates a safe space to be yourself. She’s rarely seen angry, carries her brother’s memory with warm humor, and lives by a simple motto: “Life’s too short not to have a little fun, honey !”
